Incoming service run at the bottom of the sheet: '2-10 IEC 01-25 mm.PVC นอกอาคารเดินลอย' exterior exposed run down to a weatherproof bell switch (SB, circled) at the bottom edge of the plan, referenced to level ±0.00

warnings: GRID: same as EE-03/EE-04 -- a house-wide grid master (บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_01_หน้า00_gridline.json) appeared partway through this extraction batch; this page's independently-read dimension chain matches the master's named+dummy grid exactly.

No boxed/waterproof-cover (⊟) outlet symbol was confidently identified anywhere on this sheet -- all outlets, including those in ซักล้าง/ครัว (wet areas), appear to use the plain ⊖ symbol, same pattern flagged as unexpected in the house #2 reference extraction (a waterproof variant would ordinarily be expected in kitchen/laundry areas). Flagged for cross-check rather than asserted.

จอดรถ (carport) and เฉลียง (porch) show no receptacle outlets on this sheet -- consistent with the equivalent house #2 EE-04 sheet, which also had no outlets in unenclosed/exterior circulation spaces.

The ซักล้าง room itself shows no distinctly separate outlet mark from the ครัว-boundary outlet at this resolution -- unlike house #2 where a laundry/kitchen-corner outlet cluster was explicitly called out; flagged as a possible undercount rather than asserted as zero.
This is the ground-floor counterpart to EE-06 (page 61) -- together they cover this 2-story house's full receptacle layout.
